name: io.github.goran-arsov/freshjots-mcp
description: Read and write your Fresh Jots notes from Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client — list, create, append, update, move, and organize plain-text notes and folders. The standout tool is append-to-note: append to a note by filename and create it on first write, the logging primitive for AI session transcripts, cron output, and journals.
title: Fresh Jots

environmentVariables.name: FRESHJOTS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Fresh Jots API token. Create one at https://freshjots.com/settings/api_tokens (Pro or Team plan).
